Natural Language Description: Execute a series of child nodes in order from left to right.
Behavior Template: Execute [actions] in order. If [action] fails, stop sequence. If [action] is RUNNING, wait for [action] to finish. Else move to the next [action].

Natural Language Description: Execute a series of child nodes in order, from left to right, remembering which ones have already succeeded.
Behavior Template: Execute [actions] in sequence. If [action] returns success, move to the next. If [action] returns RUNNING, store child index in memory and resume from index. Else if [action] fails, reset memory.

Natural Language Description: Execute child node based on blackboard value.
Behavior Template: Read blackboard value. Compare it against a set of cases and execute matching [action]. If no case matches the value, execute default [action].

Natural Language Description: Execute a node while a condition is true else execute and alternative node if that same condition fails.
Behavior Template: While a given condition is true, execute do branch [action]. If the condition fails, execute else branch [action].

Natural Language Description: Repeatedly execute a child node for a specified number of iterations, until a specific status is returned or forever.
Behavior Template: Execute [action] continuously until a FAILURE or SUCCESS is returned. Else return RUNNING and keep executing [action] forever.

Natural Language Description: Execute multiple child nodes simultaneously, ensuring all are completed successfully.
Behavior Template: Execute a series of [actions] simultaneously. If success threshold is reached, return SUCCESS. Else if failure threshold is reached, return FAILURE. Else return RUNNING.

Natural Language Description: Execute child nodes sequentially from left to right, until one succeeds or all fail.
Behavior Template: Execute [actions] in order. If [action] fails, move to the next [action] until any [action] succeeds. Then return SUCCESS. If no [action] succeeds, return FAILURE.

Natural Language Description: Force child node to succeed regardless of the conditions.
Behavior Template: Execute [action] but make sure it always returns SUCCESS, unless the [action] is still RUNNING.

Natural Language Description: Force child node to fail regardless of the conditions.
Behavior Template: Execute [action] but make sure it always returns FAILURE when it is complete.

Natural Language Description: Repeatedly execute child node until success is achieved.
Behavior Template: Keep retrying the [action] until it succeeds. Then stop [action] execution and return SUCCESS.

Natural Language Description: Retry the execution of a child node for either a fixed number of times or until the node is executed successfully.
Behavior Template: Repeatedly execute [action] whenever it fails. Repeat for a specified retry count or until SUCCESS is returned.

Natural Language Description: Execute a series of child nodes in order from left to right. While a later node is running, re-evaluate previous child nodes.
Behavior Template: Execute [actions] in order. If [action] returns SUCCESS, move to the next. If [action] fails, stop and return FAILURE. If [action] is RUNNING, return RUNNING but re-evaluate previous [actions] in order.

Natural Language Description: Execute a series of child nodes in order from left to right. While a later node is running, restart evaluation from node 0.
Behavior Template: Execute a series of [actions] in order. If [action] returns SUCCESS, stop execution. Else keep running and re-evaluate previous [actions] in order, whenever an [action] is in execution.

Natural Language Description: Execute a set of child nodes multiple times.
Behavior Template: Execute [action] a set number of times or infinitely.

Natural Language Description: Check if a value in memory can be either true or false matches the expected value.
Behavior Template: Look up a value in the blackboard. If the value matches target, return SUCCESS. Else return FAILURE. Also, if the blackboard does not have required key return FAILURE.

Natural Language Description: Wait for a given duration before running or returning a result from the associated child node.
Behavior Template: Execute [action]. If the [action] returns SUCCESS, start delay timer. While delay is active, return RUNNING. After delay, return SUCCESS.

Natural Language Description: Negate a condition.
Behavior Template: Execute an [action]. If [action] returns SUCCESS or FAILURE return the reverse. Else return RUNNING.

Natural Language Description: Keep re-running child node as long as it does not fail.
Behavior Template: Execute [action]. If [action] returns SUCCESS, retart it and keep running. Else if [action] returns FAILURE, stop looping and return SUCCESS. Else return RUNNING.

Natural Language Description: Continuously retry a child node until it succeeds.
Behavior Template: Keep executing [action] until it returns SUCCESS. If retry returns FAILURE, restart [action]. Else return RUNNING.

Natural Language Description: Execute child node, but only for a maximum duration.
Behavior Template: If the execution of an [action] does not end within a specified duration, interrupt it and return a specific result.
